notes: #572 duplicate guardian card fix on branch fix/commitment-lapsing-ping-dedup. commitment_lapsing re-posted the same Slack card 2-3x/day (live receipts 06-27 18:26 / 06-28 11:49 / 06-28 18:29 UTC). Root cause: buildTriggerKey embeds state.updated_at which the ping rewrites on persist, so dedup never matches its own prior key. Fix = per-commitment identity + 20h cooldown (cursor last_lapsing_key/last_lapsing_pinged_at). Additive suppression only; fail-safe, no paid call, no schema change. vitest lib/workday-presence green (162); typecheck clean; gate:continuity green. #573 = the doctrine-level decision to retire the homework-nag delivery (owner call). #567 parked (owner sign-off: tkg_goals re-ground + Gmail connector 1->967).
